features: Smart activity suggestion chain with confidence badges

changes: Added multi-ADO connector support for multiple Azure DevOps organizations

Fixed break timer stuck at 00:00 after DST change
Fixed activity suggestion cross-customer contamination
Fixed notification sounds not loading on shared-host deployments

Added ERP import via AI with preview-before-create workflow
